title: inga auristellae
intro: Inga auristellae, also known as the Inga tree or Guanacaste, is a species of flowering plant in the family Mimosaceae. Inga auristellae is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Inga auristellae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Inga auristellae include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be made by boiling the leaves and bark in water or mixing them with other herbs to create a medicinal tea or paste.
